arts.ttl: Cheltenham Town sign "best right-back in League of Ireland" as "warrior" Darragh Power joins after leaving Waterford
arts.sum: Cheltenham Town have completed the signing of right-back Darragh Power from League of Ireland Premier Division club Waterford FC on an 18-month deal. In September (second last month of the season), Darragh had over 184 duels won.

Port Vale were top of the league heading into December, however Darren Moore's side have now won just one of their last eight games. Cheltenham's 5-3 defeat to Notts County on Sunday was their first ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Port Vale vs. Cheltenham Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's League Two clash between Port Vale and Cheltenham Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
